chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.89 of 2006 Mohammad Younus Bawany through L.Rs. Versus Mohammad Feroz Punjani DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.463/2006 (U/S-5). 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 16.01.2024 None present for the appellants. Mr. S.M. Akhtar Rizvi, Advocate for the Respondent..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. S.M. Akhtar Rizvi, learned counsel for the Respondent is in attendance, however, Kazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui, learned counsel for appellants is called absent. We have perused the order sheets of at least last three dates that is 21.09.2020, 25.10.2021 and 23.10.2023 on which dates he was called absent. There is no intimation either. It seems that the appellants and their counsel have lost their interest in the proceedings. The instant High Court Appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
